content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then for each test case, the first line contains an integer N, the number of elements in the array. The second line contains N space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the memory location of the first node and the data stored in the first node.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Create a Node class to represent each node in the linked list. For each test case, create a new node with the first element of the array and print its memory location and data.

code.Python3:
# Node class represents a node in the linked list
class Node:
    def __init__(self, data, next=None):
        self.data = data      # Data value
        self.next = next      # Pointer to next node

# Driver code
if __name__ == "__main__":
    T = int(input())
    for _ in range(T):
        N = int(input())
        arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
        y = Node(arr[0])
        print(y)
        print(y.data)
